Our 3 Pillars of Digital Resilience

Three converging pillars providing complete cybersecurity coverage for businesses in Estados Unidos.

STAR PROTECTION
Defensa Activa

Migracion a modelos EDR/XDR gestionados. Proteccion recurrente como base de la relacion comercial con el cliente. Seguridad endpoint, email y servidores.

Proteccion endpoint multicapa con IA, deteccion 99.9%, gesti...

STAR INSPECTION
Visibilidad y Riesgo

El diagnostico gratuito es el producto inicial. Convierte problema percibido en evidencia tecnica + impacto financiero. Superficie de ataque, vulnerabilidades y monitoreo.

Enthec - Superficie de Ataque (Identidades)

Test de intrusion profesional certificado CEH/OSCP. Auditori...
rThreat - Red Team & BAS
Simulacion de brechas y ataques con malware real en entornos...

Normativa y Gobierno

Consultoria especializada hacia certificacion ISO 27001 para sectores regulados (Superfinanciera, SIC). Genera el ticket mas alto y la relacion mas larga.

Industry Expertise

Industries We Serve in South Florida

From Brickell's financial district to PortMiami's logistics hub, we deliver sector-specific cybersecurity that understands your compliance obligations and threat landscape.

Healthcare & Medical

HIPAA Compliance

We protect patient records, medical devices, and telehealth platforms for hospitals, clinics, and healthcare networks across South Florida.

Financial Services

PCI DSS · SOC 2

Banks, credit unions, investment firms, and FinTech companies in Miami's financial hub rely on us for PCI DSS compliance and advanced threat detection.

Legal Firms

Client Data Protection

Law firms and legal practices require ironclad data protection. We secure privileged communications, case files, and client confidentiality across your entire practice.

Real Estate

Wire Fraud Prevention

South Florida's booming real estate market is a prime target for business email compromise (BEC) and wire fraud. We protect transactions and client communications.

Technology Startups

SOC 2 · ISO 27001

Miami's growing tech scene demands security-by-design. We help startups achieve SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certifications to close enterprise deals faster.

Manufacturing & Logistics

OT/ICS Security

PortMiami and the surrounding industrial corridor require OT/ICS security. We protect operational technology, supply chains, and logistics platforms from cyberattacks.

Threat Intelligence

South Florida's Cybersecurity Landscape

Miami's position as the gateway to Latin America makes it a high-value target for threat actors. The concentration of financial services, international trade, and cross-border data flows creates unique attack surfaces that generic security vendors are not equipped to address.

Florida's healthcare and real estate sectors are among the most targeted in the nation. Business email compromise (BEC) attacks targeting real estate wire transfers, ransomware attacks on medical practices, and supply chain compromises affecting logistics firms at PortMiami are all growing threats. Starsolution's local SOC team monitors the regional threat landscape continuously, correlating global intelligence with South Florida-specific attack patterns.

Get a Free Security Assessment
#1

Florida ranks 3rd in the US for total cybercrime losses (FBI IC3 2024)

of South Florida SMBs experienced at least one cyberattack in the past 12 months

average cost of a data breach for a Florida-based company (IBM Security 2024)

247

days average time to identify and contain a breach without managed detection

Coverage Area

Serving Miami-Dade, Broward & Palm Beach Counties

Our South Florida presence covers the entire tri-county area with both remote and on-site cybersecurity services. From the startup corridors of Wynwood and Brickell to the corporate parks of Doral and Coral Gables, we protect businesses of all sizes across the region.

Miami-Dade County

Miami, Coral Gables, Doral, Hialeah, Homestead, Miami Beach, Miami Gardens, Kendall

Broward County

Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pembroke Pines, Miramar, Davie, Plantation, Sunrise, Weston

Palm Beach County

Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, Lake Worth, Wellington

Why Miami Businesses Choose Starsolution

  • 01

    Bilingual English/Spanish Team

    No language barriers for Miami's diverse business community, from Brickell multinationals to Doral's Latin American companies.

  • 02

    Cross-Border Expertise

    12+ years securing companies across the US, Colombia, and Venezuela — understanding Latin American compliance nuances that local US firms miss.

  • 03

    Florida-Specific Compliance Guidance

    Deep familiarity with Florida's cybersecurity laws, healthcare data regulations, and the specific requirements of South Florida's regulated industries.

  • 04

    Sub-1-Hour Incident Response

    Managed clients get guaranteed incident response under 60 minutes, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week — backed by our regional SOC.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from South Florida businesses about our cybersecurity services.

Do you offer cybersecurity services in Spanish?
Yes. Our Miami team is fully bilingual English/Spanish, allowing us to serve both English-speaking and Latin American businesses in South Florida without language barriers. All deliverables, reports, and support are available in both languages.
What areas in South Florida do you serve?
We serve Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties, including Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Coral Gables, Doral, Boca Raton, Hollywood, Hialeah, Pembroke Pines, and surrounding areas.
Do I need to be physically in Miami to use your services?
No. We offer fully remote cybersecurity assessments, managed EDR/XDR, virtual CISO services, and pentesting for businesses anywhere in Florida and Latin America. On-site engagements are available for local clients.
What compliance frameworks do you help with?
We help South Florida businesses achieve and maintain HIPAA, SOC 2 Type I & II, PCI DSS, CMMC (for defense contractors), NIST CSF, and ISO 27001 compliance. Our team understands Florida-specific regulatory requirements.
How quickly can you respond to a security incident in Miami?
Our Miami SOC team provides under 1-hour incident response for managed clients, with 24/7 availability. For on-site response in Miami-Dade, Broward, or Palm Beach counties, we can typically dispatch within 4 hours during business hours.
Do you work with Latin American companies that have operations in Miami?
Absolutely. Many of our Miami clients are Latin American companies with US operations, or US companies with Latin American subsidiaries. Our bilingual team and cross-border experience make us uniquely qualified to handle these complex environments.
Schedule a Free Consultation
Regulatory Compliance

Compliance for South Florida Businesses

South Florida's regulated industries face strict federal and state compliance requirements. Our team has deep experience helping local businesses achieve and maintain the certifications that matter most.

HIPAA

Healthcare Organizations

South Florida is home to one of the largest healthcare ecosystems in the Southeast US. Hospitals, medical practices, dental offices, telehealth providers, and health insurance companies are all required to comply with HIPAA's Security Rule for electronic Protected Health Information (ePHI). A single breach can trigger OCR investigations, fines of up to $1.9M per violation category, and reputational damage that's nearly impossible to recover from.

  • HIPAA Security Risk Analysis (SRA)
  • Technical safeguards: encryption, access controls, audit logs
  • Breach notification procedures and incident response
  • Business Associate Agreements (BAA) review

CMMC 2.0

Defense Contractors

South Florida's proximity to US Southern Command (SOUTHCOM) in Doral and multiple military installations makes it a hub for defense contractors handling Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC 2.0) is now mandatory for all DoD contractors. Without Level 2 certification, companies cannot bid on or continue existing DoD contracts — a business-ending consequence for many South Florida defense firms.

  • CMMC Level 2 gap analysis and remediation roadmap
  • NIST SP 800-171 implementation (110 controls)
  • System Security Plan (SSP) documentation
  • CUI handling and multi-factor authentication

SOX IT Controls

Public Companies

Publicly traded companies based or operating in South Florida must comply with the Sarbanes-Oxley Act's IT General Controls (ITGCs) under Section 404. This requires rigorous controls over financial systems: access management, change management, computer operations, and audit trails. External auditors scrutinize these controls annually, and weaknesses can trigger material weaknesses disclosures that damage stock value and investor confidence.

  • IT General Controls (ITGC) design and implementation
  • Privileged access management and separation of duties
  • Audit log management and tamper-evident records
  • Pre-audit readiness assessment and evidence packaging

Not sure which compliance frameworks apply to your business?

Our South Florida compliance team provides free initial consultations to identify your regulatory obligations and build a prioritized roadmap. We also support PCI DSS, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and NIST CSF for South Florida companies. Contact our Miami office to schedule your assessment.

Get Compliance Assessment
Case Study

Case Study: Miami Financial Institution

How a Brickell-based financial services firm reduced their breach risk surface by 73% while achieving full PCI DSS and SOC 2 Type II compliance within one fiscal year.

The Challenge

A mid-sized financial services company in Brickell managing over $2B in assets had grown rapidly through acquisitions, inheriting a fragmented security infrastructure across four legacy systems. They faced an upcoming PCI DSS assessment, a SOC 2 audit required by a new institutional client, and had no dedicated security staff — only an IT team stretched across operations and end-user support.

A prior pentest by another vendor had identified 47 medium-to-high severity vulnerabilities but provided no remediation roadmap, leaving leadership with a report they could not act on.

Our Approach

1

vCISO Engagement: Starsolution assigned a virtual CISO to own the security program, providing strategic direction without the cost of a full-time hire.

2

Managed EDR Deployment: Deployed Bitdefender GravityZone across 320 endpoints in 11 days, providing immediate visibility and threat detection.

3

Compliance Roadmap: Delivered a prioritized 90-day remediation plan for PCI DSS and a parallel SOC 2 Type II readiness program with evidence templates.

4

Penetration Testing: Conducted a comprehensive internal/external pentest with a remediation workshop — not just a report, but a hands-on fix session with the IT team.

Results After 12 Months

73%

Reduction in attack surface

PCI DSS

Level 1 certified, first attempt

SOC 2

Type II achieved in 9 months

$0

Breach cost during engagement period

"Starsolution didn't just give us a checklist — they built a real security program with us from the ground up. Having a bilingual team that understands both the US regulatory environment and our Latin American client base was invaluable."

Chief Operating Officer

Financial Services Firm — Brickell, Miami (name withheld for confidentiality)
